onboarding.welcomeDescription: Start sketching, or bring in a design you'd like to trace over. No setup needed.
onboarding.imageSourcesOptional: optional — enables real images in designs
onboarding.imageSourcesDescription: Add any of these keys to enable real images. Claude picks the best source for each image automatically.
onboarding.privacyNote: Keys are stored locally in your browser. They are never sent to our servers — API calls go directly to Anthropic and Google.

tour.step1Desc: Type any design — a landing page, Instagram ad, app screen. Be specific about colors, style, and content.
tour.step2Desc: Hit Enter or click Generate. Calca creates multiple variations, each one learning from the last.
tour.step3Desc: Each frame is a polished HTML/CSS design. Pan and zoom the canvas to explore.
tour.step4Desc: Want a different take? Remix any frame with a new direction.
tour.step5Desc: Click anywhere on a design to leave feedback. Calca will revise just that part.
tour.step6Desc: Export to Figma, Tailwind CSS, or React components.
tour.waitingMessage: Generate your first design to continue the tour

canvas.emptyDescription: Nothing here yet. Start a new project, or import something to trace over.

dialog.resetDescription: This will clear your current canvas. Generated designs will be lost.

banner.addApiKey: Add your API key in Settings to start designing
